briefdescription.para: This function generates PUF KEY by PUF registration or PUF on demand regeneration as per the user provided inputs.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - if PUF_KEY generation was successful.
XPUF_ERROR_SYNDROME_WORD_WAIT_TIMEOUT - Timeout occurred while waiting for PUF Syndrome data.
XPUF_ERROR_SYNDROME_DATA_OVERFLOW - Syndrome data overflow reported by PUF controller or more than required data is provided by PUF controller.
XPUF_ERROR_SYNDROME_DATA_UNDERFLOW - Number of syndrome data words are less than expected number of words.
XPUF_ERROR_INVALID_REGENERATION_TYPE - Selection of invalid regeneration type.
XPUF_ERROR_PUF_STATUS_DONE_TIMEOUT - Timeout before Status was done.
XST_FAILURE - if PUF KEY generation failed.

inbodydescription.para: PLM left shifts the the AUX value by 4-bits for NVM provisioning. During regeneration from BootHeader, the ROM expects PUF AUX value in below format: | 0x00 | AUX (23:4) | AUX_EN (3:0) |
Any non-zero value in AUX_EN is causing PUF convergence error. Hence left shifting the AUX value by 4-bits.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE - On failure of AES Encrypt Initialization, AES Encrypt data.

briefdescription.para: This function encrypts the data using PUF Key and IV.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to data to be encrypted
Length of data to be encrypted in bytes
Pointer to buffer where encrypted data will be stored

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE - On failure of AES Encrypt Initialization, AES Encrypt data.

briefdescription.para: This function prints the data array.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to the data to be printed.
- Length of the data in bytes.

briefdescription.para: This function converts AES key to the format expected by xilsecure AES library.

parameterdescription.para: - Length of the input key in bytes.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On successfully formatting of AES key.

briefdescription.para: This function programs encrypted UDS and DME private keys.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - On successfully programming encrypted UDS and DME private keys

briefdescription.para: This function changes the endianness of a 32-bit unsigned integer.

para.verbatim: It takes a 32-bit unsigned integer as input and returns the integer with its byte order reversed

parameterdescription.para: - 32 bit unsigned integer provided as input

simplesect.para: 32 bit unsigned integer with its byte order reversed

briefdescription.para: This file illustrates encryption of red key, UDS and DME private keys using PUF KEY.

detaileddescription.para: It can also be used for generating only PUF ID. To build this application, xilmailbox library must be included in BSP and xilsecure must be in client mode and xilpuf in server mode.

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes ----- --- -------- ------------------------------------------------------- 1.0 har 06/24/22 Initial release 2.1 am 04/13/23 Fix PUF auxiliary convergence error 2.2 am 05/03/23 Added KAT before crypto usage mb 08/09/23 Declare variables that are passed to server in data vss 11/22/23 Added header file required for SDT flow 2.3 vss 03/06/24 Removed server related APIs 2.4 har 05/06/24 Fixed issue in case of regeneration from eFUSE cache 2.6 rpu 07/15/25 Fixed GCC warnings 2.7 bha 01/06/26 Fixed Doxygen warnings 2.8 tvp 04/03/26 Use generic API to increment IV
